name: Maple Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
2 Spread the nuts evenly over the pie shell.
3 Mix together the butter or margarine, vanilla, and flour. Beat the eggs well, and blend into the flour mixture. Add salt, maple syrup, and cream. Pour filling over the nuts in the pie shell. Make sure the nuts are covered so they will not burn.
4 Bake for 50 to 60 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool at least 15 minutes before serving. Makes 1 pie.
